message:
feat(compression): Implement CPython-compatible submodule APIs

Implement all compression submodules with full CPython compatibility:

zlib.zig:
- Compress/Decompress classes with incremental support
- compress(), decompress(), compressobj(), decompressobj()
- crc32(), adler32() checksums
- Z_* constants (Z_DEFAULT_COMPRESSION, MAX_WBITS, etc.)

gzip.zig:
- GzipFile class with read/write/seek/tell
- open(), compress(), decompress() functions
- Header parsing (FTEXT, FHCRC, FEXTRA, FNAME, FCOMMENT)
- BadGzipFile error type

bz2.zig:
- BZ2File, BZ2Compressor, BZ2Decompressor classes
- open(), compress(), decompress() functions
- Block size configuration (1-9)

lzma.zig:
- LZMAFile, LZMACompressor, LZMADecompressor classes
- FORMAT_XZ, FORMAT_ALONE, FORMAT_RAW, FORMAT_AUTO
- CHECK_CRC32, CHECK_CRC64, CHECK_SHA256
- FILTER_*, MF_*, MODE_*, PRESET_* constants
- is_check_supported() function

zstd.zig:
- ZstdFile, ZstdCompressor, ZstdDecompressor classes
- ZSTD_STRATEGY_* constants
- open(), compress(), decompress() functions

_common.zig + _common/_streams.zig:
- BaseStream class for file streams
- DecompressReader generic helper
- BufferedReader, BufferedWriter, StreamWrapper

8 files, 2,882 insertions
